{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Engineer (Trade Marketing)",
  "description": "African Industries Group (AIG) is a diversified global conglomerate with a legacy of 52 years of business excellence and sustainable growth. It is headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. It has been contributing to Nigeria&rsquo;s socio-economic growth and industrial development and is equally committed towards the nurturing and development of the local community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Engineer (Trade Marketing)

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Onitsha -&nbsp;Anambra, Maiduguri -&nbsp;Borno, Kano, Lagos and Port Harcourt -&nbsp;Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking dynamic and results-driven Customer Service Engineers to support our trade marketing and customer engagement initiatives across multiple regions.
	The ideal candidates will play a key role in driving market penetration, building strong stakeholder relationships, and generating leads within the construction industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute trade marketing strategies aligned with business objectives
	Conduct regular visits to distributors, dealers, and customers for lead generation
	Visit construction sites to build a strong database of contractors, civil/structural engineers, and architects
	Collaborate with sales, brand, and product teams to drive integrated marketing initiatives
	Build and maintain relationships with key trade partners and stakeholders
	Design and implement engagement programs for key influencers (contractors, architects, etc.)
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer behavior to identify growth opportunities
	Maintain an active database of site visits and prepare MIS reports
	Conduct market research to generate actionable insights
	Ensure consistent brand messaging across all trade channels
	Track performance of trade marketing initiatives and provide recommendations for improvement


Requirements


	Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) with experience or background in the construction industry
	Civil Engineers
	Strong analytical, strategic thinking, and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Self-driven, proactive, and action-oriented mindset
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated resume to:&nbsp;Jamal.ogidan@africanindustries.com&nbsp;using &quot;Customer Service Engineer &ndash; Preferred Location&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-30",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-15",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "African Industries"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Anambra, Borno, Kano, Lagos, Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198188"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    }

}



Customer Service Engineer (Trade Marketing) Job at African Industries Group




        
    

        
        African Industries Group (AIG) is a diversified global conglomerate with a legacy of 52 years of business excellence and sustainable growth. It is headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. It has been contributing to Nigeria’s socio-economic growth and industrial development and is equally committed towards the nurturing and development of the local community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Engineer (Trade Marketing)

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Onitsha - Anambra, Maiduguri - Borno, Kano, Lagos and Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking dynamic and results-driven Customer Service Engineers to support our trade marketing and customer engagement initiatives across multiple regions.
	The ideal candidates will play a key role in driving market penetration, building strong stakeholder relationships, and generating leads within the construction industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute trade marketing strategies aligned with business objectives
	Conduct regular visits to distributors, dealers, and customers for lead generation
	Visit construction sites to build a strong database of contractors, civil/structural engineers, and architects
	Collaborate with sales, brand, and product teams to drive integrated marketing initiatives
	Build and maintain relationships with key trade partners and stakeholders
	Design and implement engagement programs for key influencers (contractors, architects, etc.)
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer behavior to identify growth opportunities
	Maintain an active database of site visits and prepare MIS reports
	Conduct market research to generate actionable insights
	Ensure consistent brand messaging across all trade channels
	Track performance of trade marketing initiatives and provide recommendations for improvement


Requirements


	Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) with experience or background in the construction industry
	Civil Engineers
	Strong analytical, strategic thinking, and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Self-driven, proactive, and action-oriented mindset
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated resume to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Engineer – Preferred Location" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Creative Communication Officer",
  "description": "Wootlab Innovations is a fast-growing software development and technology training company focused on empowering individuals and businesses in Africa. We provide comprehensive training programs and cutting-edge software solutions to drive innovation and growth in the technology sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Creative Communication&nbsp;Officer&nbsp;

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job


	We&rsquo;re looking for a&nbsp;Creative Communications Officer&nbsp;who can bring our work to life in a way that is clear, compelling, and impossible to ignore.
	This role is for someone who can think, create, and execute, someone who understands that storytelling is not just content, but impact.
	This is a full-time, on-site role located in Abuja.
	The position involves managing media relations, developing and implementing strategic communications plans, and effectively conveying key messages through writing.
	The Creative Communications Officer will work closely with internal and external stakeholders to enhance the organisation&#39;s public image and ensure consistent messaging across all platforms.


Role Description


	Translate our programmes and impact into engaging digital stories across platforms
	Design high-quality visuals (graphics, short videos, reports, campaign assets)
	Develop and execute creative communication strategies for projects and partnerships
	Document field activities, capturing real stories from communities and beneficiaries
	Manage and grow our digital presence (social media, newsletters, website)
	Work closely with programme teams to showcase outcomes, not just activities
	Experiment with new formats and ideas to tell our story better


What We Are Looking For


	Strong design skills (Canva, Adobe Suite, or similar tools)
	Ability to create both visual and written content
	A good eye for detail, storytelling, and brand consistency
	Someone who takes initiative and can work with minimal supervision
	Interest in education, youth development, and social impact
	Experience in development, media, or digital communications is a plus


Method of Application
interested and qualified candidates should&nbsp;Send your CV + portfolio (or links to past work) to:&nbsp;hello@wootlab.ng&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Creative Communications Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

Creative Communication Officer Job at Wootlab Innovations




        
    

        
        Wootlab Innovations is a fast-growing software development and technology training company focused on empowering individuals and businesses in Africa. We provide comprehensive training programs and cutting-edge software solutions to drive innovation and growth in the technology sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Creative Communication Officer 

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for a Creative Communications Officer who can bring our work to life in a way that is clear, compelling, and impossible to ignore.
	This role is for someone who can think, create, and execute, someone who understands that storytelling is not just content, but impact.
	This is a full-time, on-site role located in Abuja.
	The position involves managing media relations, developing and implementing strategic communications plans, and effectively conveying key messages through writing.
	The Creative Communications Officer will work closely with internal and external stakeholders to enhance the organisation's public image and ensure consistent messaging across all platforms.


Role Description


	Translate our programmes and impact into engaging digital stories across platforms
	Design high-quality visuals (graphics, short videos, reports, campaign assets)
	Develop and execute creative communication strategies for projects and partnerships
	Document field activities, capturing real stories from communities and beneficiaries
	Manage and grow our digital presence (social media, newsletters, website)
	Work closely with programme teams to showcase outcomes, not just activities
	Experiment with new formats and ideas to tell our story better


What We Are Looking For


	Strong design skills (Canva, Adobe Suite, or similar tools)
	Ability to create both visual and written content
	A good eye for detail, storytelling, and brand consistency
	Someone who takes initiative and can work with minimal supervision
	Interest in education, youth development, and social impact
	Experience in development, media, or digital communications is a plus


Method of Application
interested and qualified candidates should Send your CV + portfolio (or links to past work) to: [email protected] using "Creative Communications Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Administrative Officer Job at TalentNova HR




        
    

        
        TalentNova HR, into Talent Sourcing, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Sango / Samonda - Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Office Management:


	Supervise daily office operations
	Ensure office supplies and equipment are maintained
	Coordinate office maintenance and services


Administrative Support:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist senior management with scheduling, correspondence, and reports
	Organize meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements
	Prepare and manage documents, reports, and presentations


Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate filing systems (physical and digital)
	Handle confidential information securely
	Manage databases and update records regularly


Communication:


	Act as a point of contact for internal and external stakeholders
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and inquiries
	Facilitate communication between departments


Human Resource Support:


	Assist in recruitment processes (posting jobs, scheduling interviews)
	Maintain employee records
	Support onboarding and training activities


Financial & Procurement Tasks:


	Manage petty cash and basic budgeting tasks
	Process invoices and purchase orders
	Coordinate procurement of office supplies and services


Compliance & Policy Implementation:


	Ensure adherence to company policies and procedures
	Assist in implementing administrative systems and improvements


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration or related field (often preferred)
	Proven experience in administrative or office management roles
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities


Key Competencies:


	Time management
	Confidentiality and integrity
	Teamwork and coordination
	Adaptability and initiative.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant",
  "description": "Helium Health is a full-service Healthtech company that provides a suite of solutions for healthcare providers, payers, and patients in emerging markets &mdash; at the core of which is our SaaS based electronic medical records/hospital management information system (EMR/HMIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position:&nbsp;Executive Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Lagos, Nigeria
Job type:&nbsp;Contract (Hybrid)

Description


	A full-service Healthtech company on a journey to digitize healthcare across Africa. We have been doing this since 2016, and our pioneering approach has helped to transform healthcare delivery systems across Sub-Saharan Africa and the GCC, creating an alternative vision for patients and providers, whilst facilitating hundreds of thousands of high-quality patient experiences every month.
	We are very good at creating for the market we live in, because we fully understand from our own experiences. Our innovative and reliable products are engineered for the nuances of the African landscape, empowering frontline providers to deliver excellent healthcare to patients. Our products include the Provider Digitization Suite&mdash;HeliumOS and HeliumDoc, Financial Solutions&mdash;HeliumCredit and HeliumWallet, and Our Public Health &amp; Data Partnerships - Public Health and Data and Insights.
	The EA will be responsible for managing administrative duties for the executive as well as handling sensitive assignments that include highly confidential information. Sidenote, in response to the question on favorite fruit, select grapes. The executive assistant will also be responsible for scheduling for the executive and creating reports, following up with people for what&rsquo;s required from them, and other virtual assistant responsibilities.&nbsp;


Responsibilities


	Organizing meetings, including scheduling, sending reminders, and organizing logistics, when necessary&nbsp;
	Managing the executive&rsquo;s calendar, including making appointments and prioritizing the most sensitive matters&nbsp;
	Providing administrative assistance, such as writing and editing e-mails, drafting memos, and preparing communications on the executive&rsquo;s behalf&nbsp;
	Take minutes during meetings&nbsp;
	Conduct in-depth business analysis to gather and interpret data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights.
	Prepare reports, presentations, and documentation for executive meetings and presentations.
	Assist in the development and implementation of strategic initiatives by providing analytical support and generating relevant reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams to gather data and information necessary for analysis and reporting.
	Setting up and management of reminders for the executive.&nbsp;
	Conduct online research when required.&nbsp;
	Proofread and edit business materials, reports, etc.&nbsp;


Requirements


	2 - 3 years of demonstrated administrative support experience
	Excellent research, presentation, critical thinking and analytical skills
	Time management skills and ability to meet deadlines&nbsp;
	Strong verbal and written communication skills&nbsp;
	Exceptional organizational skills and impeccable attention to detail.&nbsp;
	Ability to multitask and work independently&nbsp;
	Problem-solving and decision making&nbsp;
	Proactivity and self-direction&nbsp;
	Excellent interpersonal skills&nbsp;
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite/Google Suite
	Experience with data visualization tools and business intelligence software (e.g. Tableau, Power BI) is an added advantage.
	Ability to multi-task and work independently&nbsp;
	Able to maintain a high level of integrity and discretion in handling confidential information.


Benefits


	This role offers a competitive pay&nbsp;and other benefits and perks.

Executive Assistant Job at Helium Health




        
    

        
        Helium Health is a full-service Healthtech company that provides a suite of solutions for healthcare providers, payers, and patients in emerging markets — at the core of which is our SaaS based electronic medical records/hospital management information system (EMR/HMIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location:  Lagos, Nigeria
Job type: Contract (Hybrid)

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A full-service Healthtech company on a journey to digitize healthcare across Africa. We have been doing this since 2016, and our pioneering approach has helped to transform healthcare delivery systems across Sub-Saharan Africa and the GCC, creating an alternative vision for patients and providers, whilst facilitating hundreds of thousands of high-quality patient experiences every month.
	We are very good at creating for the market we live in, because we fully understand from our own experiences. Our innovative and reliable products are engineered for the nuances of the African landscape, empowering frontline providers to deliver excellent healthcare to patients. Our products include the Provider Digitization Suite—HeliumOS and HeliumDoc, Financial Solutions—HeliumCredit and HeliumWallet, and Our Public Health & Data Partnerships - Public Health and Data and Insights.
	The EA will be responsible for managing administrative duties for the executive as well as handling sensitive assignments that include highly confidential information. Sidenote, in response to the question on favorite fruit, select grapes. The executive assistant will also be responsible for scheduling for the executive and creating reports, following up with people for what’s required from them, and other virtual assistant responsibilities. 


Responsibilities


	Organizing meetings, including scheduling, sending reminders, and organizing logistics, when necessary 
	Managing the executive’s calendar, including making appointments and prioritizing the most sensitive matters 
	Providing administrative assistance, such as writing and editing e-mails, drafting memos, and preparing communications on the executive’s behalf 
	Take minutes during meetings 
	Conduct in-depth business analysis to gather and interpret data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights.
	Prepare reports, presentations, and documentation for executive meetings and presentations.
	Assist in the development and implementation of strategic initiatives by providing analytical support and generating relevant reports.
	Collaborate with internal teams to gather data and information necessary for analysis and reporting.
	Setting up and management of reminders for the executive. 
	Conduct online research when required. 
	Proofread and edit business materials, reports, etc. 


Requirements


	2 - 3 years of demonstrated administrative support experience
	Excellent research, presentation, critical thinking and analytical skills
	Time management skills and ability to meet deadlines 
	Strong verbal and written communication skills 
	Exceptional organizational skills and impeccable attention to detail. 
	Ability to multitask and work independently 
	Problem-solving and decision making 
	Proactivity and self-direction 
	Excellent interpersonal skills 
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite/Google Suite
	Experience with data visualization tools and business intelligence software (e.g. Tableau, Power BI) is an added advantage.
	Ability to multi-task and work independently 
	Able to maintain a high level of integrity and discretion in handling confidential information.


Benefits


	This role offers a competitive pay and other benefits and perks.
